chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Crl. Misc. Application No.S-80 of 2025 Applicant: Rustum Ul Zaman s/o Umeed Ali Shahani, through Mr. Muhammad Zakaria Baloch, Advocate Respondent No.1 Respondent No.3 Respondent No.4 Respondent No.5 Respondent No.6::::: The State, through Mr.Khalid Hussain Lakho, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh alongwith Inspector Manzoor Ali o/b of SSP Hyderabad, ASI Muhammad Yousif Rajput from P.S. Baldia SSP, Hyderabad. The Senior Superintendent of Police, Hyderabad through the DPG above The S.H.O. P.S. Baldia Qasimabad through Mr. Lala Imtiaz Pathan, Advocate Ghulam Sarwar s/o Ghulam Hussain Sagar s/o Muneer through Mr. Abdul Samee Chandio, Advocate Date of hearing: 08.12.2025 Date of Short Order: 02.01.2026. O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled Cr. Misc. Application is dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
